reasoning: Google's Gemini series (1.5 Pro, 2.5 Pro) has consistently reached and held the #1 spot on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard throughout 2024 and 2025. While OpenAI's GPT-5 reportedly took the lead in August 2025, Google has a strong track record of late-year releases (e.g., Gemini 1.0 in Dec 2023, Gemini 2.0 in Dec 2024) and frequently uses 'experimental' models to reclaim the top spot. Additionally, the alphabetical tie-breaker rule favors Google against its primary rivals OpenAI and xAI. Given the high volatility of the leaderboard and Google's aggressive update cycle, they have a near-equal chance with OpenAI to finish the year at #1.
